name: theorie-test-helper
description: Chrome extension that translates German driving theory questions to English

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/icons && cp manifest.json content.js background.js sidebar.css popup.html popup.js dist/ && cp -r icons/* dist/icons/ 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'Build complete → dist/'
scripts.zip: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../theorie-test-helper.zip . && echo 'Packaged → theorie-test-helper.zip'
